name: io.github.Servosity/autotask-mcp
title: Autotask MCP
description: Every Autotask entity at the command line, plus a local SQLite mirror that answers ticket-aging

environmentVariables.name: AUTOTASK_PSA_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the AUTOTASK_PSA_SECRET credential for the Autotask MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: AUTOTASK_PSA_USER_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Set the AUTOTASK_PSA_USER_NAME credential for the Autotask MCP server.
